title: Bitter Better
description: Exploring personal growth and emotional struggle.
lyrics: Gotta stop that bitter, bitter fight, we're only light Stop that bitter, bitter fight, we're only light You gotta stop that bitter man, bitter man, bitter fuckin' fight Tonight we're all light Stop that bitter, the bitter fight, we're all light Hey, stop that, stop the bitter, the bitter talk In your heart that's creepin' up Inside of everything you start, the people you meet Your heart, it's bitter, make it better, come on, we're all light I knew the moment I saw you That you were the thing that's taking me through it I'm sorry the first half has made you bitter, bitter You're still alive with me I'm sorry you can't see the amazing thing this life Has in store for you and me, your bitter, bitter fight Take it away, we're all right, we're light tonight Hey, your bitter, bitter fuckin' fight Inside your brain, we're all light Take it away from your own heat Don't let the good burn up inside your mental ozone of defeat Nothing happened, no nothing, nothing happened, no nothing Bitter, bitter fight, we all take the light I know you hate it here with your bitter, bitter feelings I'm better, feelin' better, are you better, feelin' better Are you better, feelin' better You know I want what's best for the life you made with my strife But emotionally, you're just killin' me Emotionally, you don't get free You think you're protectin' somethin' but that somethin' is me Can't you see this bitter, bitter fuckin' fight You fuck with me, it makes me wish I could get inside That darkness you call in your brain It's this bitter, bitter feelin' We are the light, you gotta take those bitter, bitter feelin' And make them light tonight Find that light inside of the only way you go Inside your only heart Inside it's just a different star with those bitter, bitter feelin' We're all a light, I can't understand why you fight Those bitter, bitter, bitter, bitter, bitter, bitter feelin' Just let them become you, no one ruins this thing you call life You're still alive with your bitter, bitter feelin' Yes, nobody ruins this thing called life With your bitter, bitter feelin' You think you were gone, you think it was over You think, you think you'd want to run far away But to stay there ignoring your only voice Drippin' through the beginning, the ending I'll be there

lyricsSegments.text: Gotta stop that bitter, bitter fight, we're only light
Stop that bitter, bitter fight, we're only light
You gotta stop that bitter man, bitter man, bitter fuckin' fight
Tonight we're all light
Stop that bitter, the bitter fight, we're all light
Hey, stop that, stop the bitter, the bitter talk
In your heart that's creepin' up
Inside of everything you start, the people you meet
Your heart, it's bitter, make it better, come on, we're all light
I knew the moment I saw you
That you were the thing that's taking me through it
I'm sorry the first half has made you bitter, bitter
You're still alive with me
I'm sorry you can't see the amazing thing this life
Has in store for you and me, your bitter, bitter fight
Take it away, we're all right, we're light tonight
Hey, your bitter, bitter fuckin' fight
Inside your brain, we're all light
Take it away from your own heat
Don't let the good burn up inside your mental ozone of defeat
Nothing happened, no nothing, nothing happened, no nothing
Bitter, bitter fight, we all take the light
I know you hate it here with your bitter, bitter feelings
I'm better, feelin' better, are you better, feelin' better
Are you better, feelin' better
You know I want what's best for the life you made with my strife
But emotionally, you're just killin' me
Emotionally, you don't get free
You think you're protectin' somethin' but that somethin' is me
Can't you see this bitter, bitter fuckin' fight
You fuck with me, it makes me wish I could get inside
That darkness you call in your brain
It's this bitter, bitter feelin'
We are the light, you gotta take those bitter, bitter feelin'
And make them light tonight
Find that light inside of the only way you go
Inside your only heart
Inside it's just a different star with those bitter, bitter feelin'
We're all a light, I can't understand why you fight
Those bitter, bitter, bitter, bitter, bitter, bitter feelin'
Just let them become you, no one ruins this thing you call life
You're still alive with your bitter, bitter feelin'
Yes, nobody ruins this thing called life
With your bitter, bitter feelin'
You think you were gone, you think it was over
You think, you think you'd want to run far away
But to stay there ignoring your only voice
Drippin' through the beginning, the ending
I'll be there
